attributes.action: Allocate vouchers for people who have coeliac disease or reduce prices.
attributes.additional_details: With cost of living rising, it is becoming more difficult for people with coeliac disease to afford to pay for their gluten free alternatives.
attributes.background: The price of gluten free alternatives is extortionate. On average the weekly shop is £30 more. Something needs to be done to either lower prices or allocate vouchers for those with coeliac disease.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

More items on prescription for individuals who have coeliac disease in England
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765440
